CREATE TABLE subscriptions (id INTEGER, name VARCHAR, status VARCHAR);
CREATE TABLE publications (id INTEGER, title VARCHAR, published_date DATE);
INSERT INTO subscriptions (id, name, status) VALUES (1, 'sub1', 'ON'), (2, 'sub2', 'OFF'), (3, 'sub3', 'IN SYNC');
INSERT INTO publications (id, title, published_date) VALUES (1, 'pub1', '2023-01-01'), (2, 'pub2', '2023-02-01');
CREATE TABLE replication_status AS SELECT s.name AS subscription_name, p.title AS publication_title, s.status FROM subscriptions s JOIN publications p ON s.id = p.id;
CREATE VIEW replication_view AS SELECT subscription_name, publication_title, status FROM replication_status WHERE status = 'ON';
SELECT subscription_name, publication_title FROM replication_view WHERE subscription_name IN (SELECT name FROM subscriptions WHERE status = 'ON');
SELECT DISTINCT status FROM replication_view WHERE status IN (SELECT status FROM subscriptions);
SELECT s.name AS subscription_name, p.title AS publication_title FROM subscriptions s FULL OUTER JOIN publications p ON s.id = p.id WHERE s.status = 'IN SYNC' OR p.published_date > '2023-01-01';
DELETE FROM subscriptions WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM subscriptions WHERE status = 'OFF');
UPDATE subscriptions SET status = 'ON' WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM subscriptions WHERE status = 'OFF' LIMIT 1);
SELECT s.name, COUNT(*) AS publication_count FROM subscriptions s LEFT JOIN publications p ON s.id = p.id GROUP BY s.name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT s.name AS subscription_name, CASE WHEN p.published_date IS NOT NULL THEN 'PUBLISHED' ELSE 'NOT PUBLISHED' END AS status FROM subscriptions s LEFT JOIN publications p ON s.id = p.id;
